explanation: The code implements a recursive function to generate permutations of the numbers 1 through N. It uses a boolean array to track which digits have been used in the current permutation, and an integer array to store the current permutation being constructed. The function 'foo' recursively builds the permutation by selecting digits that haven't been used yet, and once a full permutation is built, it is printed to the console.
name: 2009-05-26_unnamed
subject: Print All Permutations
summary: This project generates and prints all permutations of the numbers from 1 to N, where N is defined as 4.
